brand.slogan: Quality begins with proper management of good equipment...
brand.bilingual: What you see is what we have !! *** Lo que ves es lo que tenemos !!

hero.description: Create your equipment requests right here — with just a few clicks you'll know everything about our availability and much more.

workflow.title: Request Process
workflow.subtitle: Manage your inventory efficiently through our automated digital workflow.
workflow.step1_desc: Log in to enable request features. The catalog is public for browsing.
workflow.step2_desc: Browse the catalog and add the required equipment to your request cart.
workflow.step3_desc: Confirm project details and submit the request for administrative review.
workflow.step4_desc: The request remains pending until an administrator verifies and authorizes the loan.
workflow.notice: Customers do not need a session to view the catalog but do need one to request equipment.

categories.title: Equipment Categories
categories.subtitle: Specialized instrumentation for every phase of your project.

features.title: Detailed Equipment Information
features.subtitle: Full transparency on every unit in our inventory.
features.f1_desc: Direct access to current calibration documents, ISO certificates, and technical safety sheets.
features.f2_desc: Detailed list of cables, probes, cases, and peripherals that accompany each requested unit.
features.f3_desc: Complete tracking of previous projects and locations where the equipment has been deployed.

footer.tagline: Providing high-end industrial measurement solutions and equipment management for global construction leaders since 1994.
footer.address: Parque industrial Milenium, Boulevard Milenium #5060, CP. 66626, Apodaca, N.L.
